ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Hormonal Therapy, Chemotherapy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administration_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administration route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the administration route (e.g., Oral, Intravenous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the administration route */,
  "recommended_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment recommended for administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code for the status (e.g., Available, No Longer Used) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_classes" (
  "major_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major class */,
  "major_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the major class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major class */,
  "sub_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minor_classes" (
  "minor_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minor class */,
  "minor_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the minor class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the minor class */,
  "sub_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minor_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packaging" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "ndc_11" TEXT /* NDC-11 code for the product */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging (e.g., bottle, vial) */,
  "package_size" TEXT /* Size of the packaging (e.g., 20 mL, 100 tablets) */,
  "packaging_material" TEXT /* Material used for packaging */,
  "temperature_requirements" TEXT /* Temperature requirements for storage */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the product in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "ndc_11" TEXT /* NDC-11 code for the product */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Alternative name for the product */,
  "alias_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the alias */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id")
)
column_names: Name of the category (e.g., Hormonal Therapy, Chemotherapy)
Unique identifier for each administration route
Name of the administration route (e.g., Oral, Intravenous)
Code for the status (e.g., Available, No Longer Used)
Unique identifier for each major class
Unique identifier for each minor class
Size of the packaging (e.g., 20 mL, 100 tablets)
Shelf life of the product in the package
Description or notes about the alias
